dailyPhrases: Taking care of the household money is taking care of time together.
Every small saving becomes calm in the family's heart.
Planning bills opens space for hugs.
Our table feels lighter when the budget is clear.
Saving a little today is protecting the tomorrow of those we love.
Talking about spending is an act of care.
Financial peace begins with unity.
When the home gets organized, love breathes better.
Well-managed money becomes quality time.
Family dreams fit when we walk together.
Balance in the accounts, harmony at home.
The budget is the map of our peace.
Every conscious choice strengthens our home.
The family's security is born from small agreements.
Organizing the month is saving affection for difficult days.
Financial care is a way of saying "I'm here".
Sharing responsibilities multiplies trust.
Clear agreements prevent unnecessary worries.
The family's future is built with kindness and attention.
A goal is tomorrow taking shape.
A well-cared home starts with conversation.
Prioritizing together is protecting what matters.
Saving without guilt is choosing what brings peace.
Planning is allowing dreams to find a place.
The lightness of home comes from transparency.
Aligned money, peaceful heart.
Taking care of bills is taking care of people.
Every organized month leaves space for affection.
Love also lives in the details of the budget.
Together, what seemed heavy becomes possible.

dashboard.subtitle: Family financial space — calm and clarity.

hero.label: Family financial system
hero.title: Take care of your family finances, together.
hero.subtitle: Florim organizes bills, income, goals, reminders and AI insights with real-time shared data. Start free and upgrade when it makes sense.
hero.subtitleMobile: Bills, goals, agreements and insights in one place. Free plan, no card required.

problems.title: The same story every month.
problems.subtitle: Three problems every family knows — and Florim solves.

items.headline: Money disappears. No one knows where.
items.body: Without a shared view, each family member sees only half the picture, and decisions are made in the dark.

items.headline: Dreams keep getting pushed to next month.
items.body: Trips, renovations, school: without a visible shared goal, money always goes somewhere else first.

items.headline: Spreadsheets no one updates twice.
items.body: They don't handle installments, need constant updating, and are forgotten after the first month.

whatsapp.title: Record everything on WhatsApp. In plain language.
whatsapp.body: No need to open the app. Just send a message like you'd tell a friend. Florim understands and logs expenses, income, installments, goals and reminders, suggests categories and answers questions about your family's finances.
whatsapp.footnote: You can also check balances, edit and delete records. The free plan has monthly limits; with Pro, the routine flows without restrictions.

features.title: All in one place.
features.subtitle: Connected tools to record, understand and anticipate the family's financial routine.

items.title: Expenses
items.copy: Expenses with automatic installments, status control and clear history.

items.title: Income
items.copy: Salaries, extra income and expected entries, visible to the whole family.

items.title: Goals & Dreams
items.copy: Goals with name and value: trip, school, renovation. Dreams stay in sight.

items.title: Comparisons
items.copy: Bar and pie charts with monthly and yearly history to understand patterns.

items.title: AI Insights
items.copy: Ask about your spending and get useful analysis, plus automatic insights.

items.title: Category Suggestions
items.copy: AI suggests categories for expenses and income based on your history.

items.title: Recurring Records
items.copy: Florim detects recurring bills and creates pending items for confirmation.

items.title: Reminders
items.copy: Alerts by category and due date. No bill goes unnoticed.

items.title: Shared Family
items.copy: Invite spouse, kids or parents. One subscription, real-time data for everyone.

items.title: Statement Import
items.copy: Import CSV and OFX statements directly from your bank. Less typing, more speed.

items.title: Smart WhatsApp
items.copy: Record, check, edit and delete entries by message, in plain language.

howItWorks.title: Simple to start.
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Five minutes. The free plan gets the family moving.

steps.title: Register your family
steps.body: Create an account, name your family and invite anyone you want — spouse, kids, parents.

steps.title: Record income and expenses
steps.body: Log bills, installments and goals in the app, or send a message on WhatsApp.

steps.title: Follow along together
steps.body: Charts, monthly comparisons and the family balance in real time, from any device.

origin.label: Our story
origin.title: Built by a family, for families.
origin.body1: Florim was born at home. Lucas, a software engineer, and Nathalia, an interior designer, realized that no existing tool treated finances as what they truly are: a conversation between people building something together.
origin.body2: The name comes from the fiorino d'oro, the golden coin of Florentine families in the 13th century. Solid value, based on trust. That's our reference.
origin.quote: Florim treats money as choice, project and human relationship.

finalCta.title: Start today. Your family will thank you.

about.title: Family financial management system
about.tagline: Florim is a family financial organization system created to bring clarity, dialogue, and peace of mind to everyday home life.
about.body1b: Florim takes care of real life. It wasn't born in a boardroom, but inside a home.
about.body2a: Here, we understand that money involves emotions, decisions, and human relationships.
about.body2b: That's why the system was designed to be simple, intuitive, and welcoming.
about.body3: At Florim, technology serves care and never excessive control.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help. Response within 1 business day.

faq.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a: In the app or website, go to Settings → Subscription → Manage plan. Cancellation is immediate and you keep access until the end of the paid period.
Yes. We accept refund requests within 7 days of the charge. Contact us at the email below stating the reason.

faq.q: How do I add a family member?
faq.a: In Settings → Family, tap "Invite member" and enter the person's email. They will receive an invite link valid for 7 days.

faq.q: Does Florim access my bank account?
faq.a: No. Florim is 100% manual — you record your entries and we organize them. We never connect to banks or perform transactions.

faq.q: How do I delete my account?
faq.a: Go to Settings → Profile → Delete account. All your data is permanently removed, per our Privacy Policy.
Yes. Data is stored on Supabase (AWS infrastructure), with encryption in transit and at rest. See our Privacy Policy for details.
